// Why both flags: We're using Vercel Root Directory = apps/web. The installCommand runs from there, so we cd ../.. first to land at the workspace root where pnpm-workspace.yaml lives — otherwise pnpm finds the config but enumerates zero workspace packages (ERR_PNPM_WORKSPACE_PKG_NOT_FOUND). --no-frozen-lockfile lets Vercel's pnpm reconcile the lockfile with package.json on the fly, which avoids version-drift failures (lockfile is in v9.0 format, Vercel's CI pnpm is 10.x).
